title: taraxacum stellare
intro: Taraxacum stellare, commonly known as the starry dandelion, is a plant species within the genus Taraxacum. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum stellare include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum stellare can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
